title: CZ Zesty Crispy Squash Wrap
description: A grassy and dense Portuguese dish featuring squash wrapped in a savory mixture, served as a solo dinner option. Sugar-free-friendly and suitable for hot pot vessels.
instructions: Preheat your hot pot vessel to 180°C.
Cut the squash into slices and season with salt, black pepper, garlic powder. Add a pinch of red chili flakes for extra heat if desired.
In another mixing bowl, combine all-purpose flour with olive oil until you achieve a crumbly consistency. Mix in sugar-free crema.
Dip the squash slices into the flour mixture and coat evenly. Heat your cooking surface (like a skillet or griddle) over medium-high heat.
Once hot, cook the coated squash pieces for 2 minutes per side. They should be crispy but still hold their shape slightly.
Transfer cooked squash to your heated hot pot vessel. Pour remaining crema mixture into vessel and mix well until combined with squash slices.
Serve hot with additional garnishes if desired.
